## Summary

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Testing checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passed

## Lint/format checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passed
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passed

## Allure/Codecov checklist

- [ ] Allure results generated (`allure-results/`)
- [ ] Coverage XML generated (`coverage.xml`)
- [ ] Codecov upload step passes in CI
